heading: Promotion; acceptance; oath of office
label: 3746 Promotion; acceptance; oath of office
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the complete revision of former chapter 21 of this title by .section 797 of this titlePub. L. 96–322
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 735 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 735 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: A Reserve officer who has been appointed under this subchapter is considered to have accepted the appointment unless delivery thereof cannot be effected.

children.label: b
children.text: A Reserve officer who has served continuously since taking the oath of office prescribed in , is not required to take a new oath of office upon appointment in a higher grade.section 3331 of title 5
